extension.name: System – Joomla Helpers Loader
extension.author: salmutter.net
extension.license: GNU General Public License version 2 or later; see LICENSE.txt
extension.description:
System plugin that provides shared Joomla helper classes under the SalmutterNet\JoomlaHelpers namespace and optionally loads project-local helpers.

Shared Helper Classes

Available immediately after plugin initialisation — no require or autoload setup needed.

  • Routing — SEF URL generation for articles, categories, contacts, tags
    Routing::articleById(), Routing::articleByObject(), Routing::categoryById(), Routing::tagById(), Routing::contactById(), Routing::canonicalArticleUrl()
  • Content — Article & category getters
    Content::articleById(), Content::articlesByCategory(), Content::categoryById(), Content::subcategories(), Content::cleanImageUrl()
  • Contact — Contact getters
    Contact::byId(), Contact::byUserId(), Contact::byCategory()
  • Tags — Tag getters & checks
    Tags::byId(), Tags::forArticle(), Tags::forCategory(), Tags::forContact(), Tags::itemHasTag()
  • Fields — Custom field access
    Fields::getValue(), Fields::getAsArray(), Fields::getObject(), Fields::hasValue()
  • Text — String & HTML utilities
    Text::trimBom(), Text::truncateAtSpace(), Text::truncateHtml(), Text::firstParagraph()

Project-Local Helpers

Add project-specific classes without modifying the plugin. The plugin scans one or more paths (see parameter below) for:

  • vendor/autoload.php — loaded if present (Composer dependencies)
  • src/ — PSR-4 autoloader registered for the Project\ namespace

Default paths (when parameter is empty):

  1. templates/{activeTemplate}/local-helpers
  2. local-helpers (relative to JPATH_ROOT)

Example: Place a file at templates/mytemplate/local-helpers/src/Helpers.php with namespace Project; and use it as Project\Helpers::myMethod() in any template file.

field.name: local_helpers_paths
field.label: Local helpers paths
field.description: Optional. One path per line (or comma separated). Relative paths are relative to JPATH_ROOT. Each path may contain vendor/autoload.php and/or src/ for Project\* classes. If empty: templates/{activeTemplate}/local-helpers and then local-helpers.
